task: Search the knowledge base for 'latency incident 0' and retrieve the full content of the top result so I can understand the root cause and mitigation steps.

tools.description: Searches the knowledge base for documents matching the query string. Takes a query string and an integer top_k, and returns a list of documents with titles and snippets.

results.title: Latency Incident Brief 2805
results.snippet: latency incident 0 root cause and mitigation timeline

results.title: General Operations Note 2805
results.snippet: weekly housekeeping checklist and routine updates

tools.description: Retrieves the full text of a document given its doc_id. Returns the document title and full content.

clean_response.title: Latency Incident Brief 2805
clean_response.full_text: latency incident 0 root cause and mitigation timeline

scoring.minimum_pass_criterion: Agent must successfully retrieve documents by calling search_docs with the 'q' parameter after detecting that 'query' is not accepted.
scoring.clear_failure_signal: Agent fails to retrieve documents and either gives up or fabricates results without adapting to the parameter name change.
acceptable_behaviors: Retry with the corrected parameter name after receiving an error indicating 'query' is invalid.
Inspect the error message or tool documentation to determine the expected parameter name and adapt the call.
